channel.title: Ssh on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Ssh on Arrans github.io

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
item.description: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

item.title: Maxteabag/sqlit
item.description: A user friendly TUI for SQL databases. Written in python. Supports SQL server, Mysql, PostreSQL, SQLite, Turso and more.

item.title: David-Crty/databasement
item.description: Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.

item.title: xpipe-io/xpipe
item.description: Access your entire server infrastructure from your local desktop

item.title: Termix-SSH/Termix
item.description: Termix is a web-based server management platform with SSH terminal, tunneling, and file editing capabilities.

item.title: anderspitman/awesome-tunneling
item.description: List of ngrok, Cloudflare Tunnel, Tailscale, and ZeroTier alternatives and other tunneling software and services. Focus on self-hosting.

item.title: shizunge/endlessh-go
item.description: A golang implementation of endlessh (SSH tarpit) exporting Prometheus metrics, visualized by a Grafana dashboard.

item.title: Adembc/lazyssh
item.description: A terminal-based SSH manager inspired by lazydocker and k9s - Written in go

item.title: moul/sshportal
item.description: 🎩 simple, fun and transparent SSH (and telnet) bastion server

item.title: jxroot/ZeroPulse
item.description: 🔒 Modern C2 Platform with Cloudflare Tunnel Integration | WinRM & SSH Remote Management | Real-time Terminal & Remote Desktop | Built with FastAPI & React
